rationale: Blind and edge-case lenses ran (acceptance skipped, genuine no-spec mode -- sdlc-light has no spec/story artifact). Both lenses' findings were verified against the actual Cache implementation and pre-fix code: the two live concerns (silent Any-degradation for forward-declared sibling refs; a dangling comment cross-reference) were either already explicitly documented in the diff's own comments/test docstrings or fixed inline during review. The remaining 8 findings (exception-safety of unset_path, unset_path-by-name collision risk, non-mapping $defs entry values, nested-vs-outer $defs shadowing) were confirmed via direct comparison against the pre-fix single-pass implementation to be pre-existing characteristics of the Cache/_process_definitions design, unrelated to this diff's two-pass change -- deferred, not this change's job. 1 dismissed as verified factually incorrect (claimed ForwardRef regression; the $defs cross-sibling-ref path never used ForwardRef resolution before this fix -- it raised, which is the bug being fixed). No decision_needed items. Commit format and Ruff both pass.
